step_rationale: Determinant of fibrin clot lysis; predicts AMI outcome.
mechanism: Homocysteine thiolactone modulates fibrin structure and plasmin-mediated lysis, influencing thrombus stability and fibrinolytic resistance in acute MI.

references.title: Homocysteine thiolactone contributes to the prognostic value of fibrin clot structure/function in coronary artery disease.
